scores.justification: The agent provided generic API call templates (POST /orders/o068/refund, POST /orders/o069/refund) but did not provide actual executable commands or concrete CLI invocations that an operator could run; the agent acknowledged the fixture world has no refund command and deferred to 'update fixture files directly' without specifying how.
